data:
Even if I write “we” on the pages of this website, it really means me, Damir Rakhmaev, at least for now. If you’d like to see me, you can check out my YouTube channel.
I’m a Learner, Engineer, Technopreneur. The Founder and CEO (😁) of a company named Damirche LLC. I had a successful career in tech as a Software Engineer, and I’ve built cool things in the past. But I always dreamed (knew?) that someday I’ll be building my own products to solve people’s problems. So, this is what I do now (and Til I Collapse 😎).
This website (damirche.com) showcases my products and helps people find them and solve their problems.
MyPhone is an app that allows you to stream your phone’s screen to your AR/VR headset. Check the link for details.

MyPhone Vision is an app that allows you to stream your phone’s screen to your Vision Pro.
Check the link for details.

If you have any questions or would like to chat with us, don’t hesitate to get in touch with us using the information below.
Email: rdamir@damirche.com

data.#:
Fix Your YouTube Experience
No More Misclicks on YouTube in Safari!
Screenshots Description BigScrubber is a Safari extension that fixes our YouTube experience.
Here’s how:
It makes the Play/Pause and Fullscreen buttons larger, so we won’t misclick anymore. It increases the spacing between the scrubber and the buttons panel, preventing accidental jumps to the start or end of the video when pausing or going fullscreen. And finally, it makes the scrubber thumb on YouTube/YouTubeTV in Safari 5x+ bigger, making it easier to grab with precision. I built it because I was so frustrated with constant misclicks that I wanted to slam my AVP on the floor.
How to get it?

data: For any questions, suggestions, or bug reports, email us: rdamir@damirche.com

data.#:
Enjoy transmuting voices!
Have a blast transforming the voices of friends, family, dogs, puppies, cats, kittens, and yourself!
Screenshots Description Have a blast transforming the voices of friends, family, dogs, puppies, cats, kittens, and yourself!
Megafn lets you:
Entertain yourself and your friends with hilarious, transformed, weird-sounding voices. Tease your friends, schoolmates, family—or even strangers—with super high-pitched or ultra low-pitched voices. Got dogs? Tease them, too! Do you think they’ll get confused? Ever wondered if your doggo would sound like a wolf with a lower pitch? Find out! Curious if kittens can growl when their voices are lowered? Try it! Amplify your voice (or your kittens’!) for even more fun. Explore how your voice (or your puppy’s!) sounds with pitch changes of 1, 2, or 3 semitones—or shifts of 1/2, 3/4, 1, or 2 octaves. Unleash your creativity and discover endless ways to have fun. Share your experiments on social media! Make and share hilarious videos on TikTok to get more views. Let the world see how YOU have FUN with Megafn! Use the hashtag #megafn to share your joy on social media.
How to get it?

data.#:
Bring Your Phone into Vision
Mirror your Android phone’s screen to Vision Pro
Screenshots Description Do you want to use your phone while wearing Vision Pro? So the screen is large enough to cover a whole wall in a room.
The app lets you do this. You can watch videos, scroll shorts, read articles, and even play games with low latency and high quality.
Available for Vision Pro Available for iPhone and Android

data.#:
Bring Your Phone into VR (Quest 2/3/Pro/3S)
Use this app to mirror your phone’s screen to AR/VR headsets
Preview Video Screenshots Description MyPhone does not offer remote control over your phone, but it lets you see the phone’s screen in a big window instead of a blurry passthrough. Use it to check notifications, watch puppy or kitten videos, scroll Instagram or TikTok, read articles, and so on. I worked really hard to optimize latency and quality.
Available for Quest 3 and Quest Pro Install via SideQuest or Join the Beta Test on App Lab
Available for iPhone and Android
